mapper.select:
SELECT res.* FROM sm_resource res
INNER JOIN sm_rel_res_role resRole ON resRole.resource_id = res.resource_id INNER JOIN sm_rel_op_role opRole ON resRole.role_id = opRole.role_id
WHERE res.expire_date IS NULL
AND opRole.expire_date is null AND opRole.op_id = #{query.opId} AND resRole.expire_date is null
AND res.parent_id = #{query.parentId}
AND res.resource_id != #{query.parentId} ORDER BY res.menu_sort ASC

SELECT res.* FROM sm_resource res
INNER JOIN sm_rel_res_role resrole ON res.resource_id = resrole.resource_id INNER JOIN sm_rel_op_role oprole ON resrole.role_id = oprole.role_id
WHERE res.expire_date IS NULL
AND resrole.expire_date IS NULL AND oprole.expire_date IS NULL AND oprole.op_id = #{opId}
ORDER BY parent_id, menu_sort ASC

SELECT res.* FROM sm_resource res
INNER JOIN sm_rel_res_role resrole ON res.resource_id = resrole.resource_id INNER JOIN sm_rel_op_role oprole ON resrole.role_id = oprole.role_id
WHERE res.expire_date IS NULL and res.resource_Type in('RESOURCE_DIR','RESOURCE_MENU','RESOURCE_ROUTER')
AND res.status = 'VALID' AND resrole.expire_date IS NULL AND oprole.expire_date IS NULL AND oprole.op_id = #{opId}
ORDER BY parent_id, menu_sort ASC

SELECT res.RESOURCE_TITLE,res.RESOURCE_CODE,res.MENU_URL FROM sm_resource res
INNER JOIN sm_rel_res_role resrole ON res.resource_id = resrole.resource_id INNER JOIN sm_rel_op_role oprole ON resrole.role_id = oprole.role_id
WHERE res.expire_date IS NULL and res.resource_Type = 'RESOURCE_BTN'
AND resrole.expire_date IS NULL AND oprole.expire_date IS NULL AND oprole.op_id = #{opId}
ORDER BY parent_id, menu_sort ASC

SELECT res.resource_code,res.resource_id,res.resource_title FROM sm_resource res
INNER JOIN sm_rel_res_role resrole ON res.resource_id = resrole.resource_id INNER JOIN sm_rel_op_role oprole ON resrole.role_id = oprole.role_id
WHERE res.resource_type='RESOURCE_BTN' AND res.expire_date IS NULL
AND resrole.expire_date IS NULL AND oprole.expire_date IS NULL AND oprole.op_id = #{opId}
AND res.parent_id=#{resId} ORDER BY parent_id, menu_sort ASC
